spell.name: Desperate Repair
spell.requirement: The triggering shield had more than 1 Hit Point before taking damage.
spell.text: You hold a shield together with the power of your magic, forcing wood and steel to fuse back together. The shield remains at 1 Hit Point and isn’t destroyed. Its construction is weakened until someone takes the time to repair it, preventing desperate repair or a similar ability from saving the same shield until your next daily preparations.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

spell.trigger: A shield within range would be reduced to 0 Hit Points by a damaging effect
